docTitle: Di Bible for One Look · From Creation rish di Church

share.title: Di Bible for One Look
share.text: For one scroll, si di big story wey di Bible dey tell and why Jesus kom.

ui.loveLabel: Love wey nor dey give up

s.ui.footer: Di Bible for One Look · Bible word komot from PCM
s.hero.title:
Di Bible,
for one look
s.hero.sub: For one scroll, si di big story wey di Bible dey tell and why Jesus kom.
s.thread.eyebrow: ONE SENTENCE WEY KOLL THRU DI WHOLE BIBLE
s.thread.h2: For di end, di Bible na just one story
s.thread.note: God promise (di kovenant), di pipol wait for long time, and for di end evritin happen and komplete for Jesus. Waka thru di 13 sin wey dey down here with dis tot for mind. Press «Si more» for evri kard to si di story deep more.
s.gospel.h2: Di true senter of di Bible
s.gospel.lead: Di Bible nor bi moral buk wey dey tok «just bi good pesin».
s.gospel.sublead: Na di story of how God, thru en grace alone, save sinnas wey nor fit save demsef. For di senter, na Jesus Christ dey stand.
s.gospel.mirror:
Israel dia round-and-round na my own piksha sef

Idol worship→Sofa→Kry out→God save→Idol worship again…

From di judges rish di exile, Israel dey do dis same round-and-round wey nor get end. Di Bible nor rite am so dat wi go laf dem sey «si as dem yeye».

Na looking-glass. E nor bi «dem na so dem dey», but e dey make wi si sey «mi too na so I dey» (1 Korintians 10:11).

One idol nor bi just woodu piksha. Na anytin wey wi love or trust pass God — moni, suksess, pipol praise, pesin, even my own sef. And to use God as way to get wetin I want, dat one too na idol worship.

For di end, di idol wey deep pass na «my own sef wey sidan for God throne».
s.gospel.coreIntro: So, how God take save dis sinna? Na dis bi di senter of di Good News wey di Bible dey announce.
s.gospel.crux:
Di whole Bible dey point go one place.

Man nor fit break di sin round-and-round by ensef, and nor even one raitious pesin dey. Na why somebody bin suppose to pay di prize for awa place.

Jesus nor just kom give betta teaching. E kom bikos no oda way bin dey to save mi — e must kom.

Di pesin wey suppose dey dat cross na mi.
Jesus karry my sin and dem nail am for there for my place.

«But dem wound am bikos of awa sin; dem beat am bikos of di bad tins wey wi do… en wounds don make us well.» — Isaya 53:5
s.faq.h: Maybe somtin still dey worry yu?
s.faq.q1: ▸ So, killer wey bilive go heaven, but pesin wey live well but nor bilive go hell?
s.faq.a1:
Na korrect kwestion. But two misundastandin dey hide insyd am.

① Di Bible nor dey divide pipol into «good» and «bad». Di measure nor bi «betta pass di pesin wey dey beside yu», but na «God perfect holiness». Before am, nobody «good rish» (Romans 3:23). So e nor bi «good pesin versus killer», but na like two pipol wey siknes wan kill — one asept di medicine, di oda one refuse am dey tok «I helti pass dat one».

② Na only one tin dey separate heaven from hell. Nor bi di mark of work, but na weda yu don receive Jesus Christ as Oga and yor sin problem don solve. Pesin wey en sin don solve thru Christ blood dey go heaven; pesin wey nor receive am and remain with en sin, nor dey go. No good work fit solve di sin problem ensef for yu.

Na why heaven and hell nor bi «prize for good behavior», but na mata of relationship with Christ. And «to bilive» nor bi mind agreement, but na to shange Oga for yor life: pesin wey truly receive am nor dey bold for sin, but e dey turn from sin deep more. Rada, di self-raitiousnes of «I dey good» na di idol wey hard pass to break, di one wey dey make pesin tink «I nor need Christ» (Luke 18:9-14).

Di Bible tok am klear: «Anybody wey bilive am, God nor go kondemn am. But di pesin wey nor bilive am, God don kondemn am already» (John 3:18). Di judgement nor bi «to mark yor life for di end», but e don already dey settle akordin to weda yu receive Christ.

Romans 3:23 · John 3:18 · Efesians 2:8-9 · Luke 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ E nor enuf to just bi good pesin, even doh I nor bilive Jesus?
s.faq.a2:
Na wetin pipol dey tink pass, but e dey misundastand wetin bi «di true problem». Make wi use one piksha.

Imajin sey yu dey for pirate ship. No mata how yu klean di deck, dey nice to di sailors, and live betta life, yu still bi pirate, bikos di ship dey karry yu go en own destination (di port of judgement). Di problem nor bi «di mark of wetin yu do», but na «which ship yu belong» (yor identity).

Na why di Good News nor dey tok «bi betta», but e dey tok «shange ship». Komot from di sin ship and kom enter Jesus: di new identity of God pikin. E nor bi to raise yor mark by yor pawa, but na to trust di One wey dey stretch en hand give yu and kross go en ship.

True-true, di Bible dey paint salvation just as dat «moove»: «E save us from darkness pawa and put us for di kingdom wey E give di pikin wey E love» (Kolossians 1:13).

Nor misundastand am: e nor mean sey to live well nor get value. But goodnes nor bi di «kondition» for salvation, na en fruit. Pesin wey don shange ship dey live well nor bi bikos of fear again, but bikos of di love of pikin.

Kolossians 1:13 · John 1:12 · John 3:3 · Efesians 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ If di pesin wey do bad tin dey tok «God don forgive mi» and dey live for peace while di pesin wey e wound still dey sofa, dat forgivenes nor cheap too mush?
s.faq.a3:
Di kwestion korrect, and dat pain na real tin. But dat kind tok nor bi «di Bible forgivenes», but na en twistin.

① God forgivenes nor cheap at-all. Sin nor dey kover like say «notin happen»; God ensef pay di prize with en Pikin life. Di cross nor show sey God dey take sin small, but e show how e heavy: na di forgivenes wey kost pass for di whole world.

② True turnin-from-sin dey bring fruit. If di pesin wey do bad tin dey hard-fes di one wey e wound dey tok «God don forgive mi, I dey for peace», dat one nor bi turnin-from-sin, na fake of am. And di forgivenes between God and mi nor dey klean di wound of di pesin wey suffer, nor dey fors am to forgive.

③ Sin nor dey ever «just pass like dat». Evri sin dey pay for one of two place: Christ karry am for di cross (for pesin wey bilive, no kondemnashon dey again, Romans 8:1), or di pesin wey refuse am rish di end go karry am ensef. So «cheap forgivenes» nor dey. Di pesin wey do bad tin still dey answa for dis world own justice too (Romans 13:1-4).

④ Di tears of di pesin wey suffer nor small before God at-all. God dey kry with doz wey dey kry, E dey remember evri tears, and for di end naim go klean dem ensef (Revelashon 21:4). Na why di pesin wey suffer nor dey karry di load of revensh alone, but e fit hand am give di God wey dey raitious (Romans 12:19: «Na mi go revensh… I go pay dem back»).

Matiu 3:8 · Romans 8:1 · Romans 13:1-4 · Revelashon 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Di Bible na true story for real? E be like old myth or novel to me.
s.faq.a4:
Na correct question — and na fine place to start. Doubt no be di opposite of faith; na di wish to check tin dem well-well. Di Bible no be myth wey you go just «believe if you feel like am,» but na record wey dem write on top of real places, dates, and people. Make I yarn small examples.

① E no be one book but na «library» — but e dey flow on one theme. Di Bible na collection of 66 books wey dem write for about 1,500 years by like 40 different people — kings, shepherd dem, fishermen, one tax collector, one doctor, people of different rank and time, wey write apart and no sabi each other, for three languages (Hebrew, Aramaic, Greek). But everything come gather, without confusion, on one theme: salvation thru Christ. Dat kind agreement hard to explain by chance or by human planning.

② Dem dey confirm am from di ground every time (archaeology). Plenty tin wey dem first tok say na story wey dem invent, «wey dey only for di Bible,» later na excavation confirm dem. Di dynasty of David by one stone wey dem write «di house of David» for am (di Tel Dan Stele); Pontius Pilate, di governor wey kill Jesus, by one inscription wey carry im name; King Hezekiah water tunnel (2 Kings 20:20) by di real tunnel and im inscription. Even di Hittite people, wey dem first call «people wey no dey exist,» come show as one big empire for di ruins.

③ Na di ancient document wey dem preserve pass (manuscripts). For di number of manuscript wey still dey, how dem gree with each other, and di time gap between when dem write am and when dem copy am, di Bible no get rival among ancient documents. Di Isaya scroll wey dem write before Christ among di Dead Sea Scrolls (wey dem find for 1947) gree with di standard text of like 1,000 years later almost letter for letter — proof say dem preserve di Bible correct-correct thru di ages.

④ Tin wey dem write before-before na so e take happen (prophecy). Di Old Testament, wey dem write hundreds of years before Jesus, point specific to im birth for Bethlehem (Maika 5:2), di servant wey go suffer (Isaya 53:5), and di tin dem wey happen for di cross (Psalm 22). E too correct to just call am coincidence.

⑤ Historian dem wey no be Christian record am too. Di Roman historian Tacitus and di Jewish historian Josephus — none of dem na Christian — mention Jesus, how dem kill am, and di early church. Pass all, di disciple dem wey first scatter from fear come put dia life for line as dem dey testify say Jesus rise from death — nobody dey die for tin wey dem know say na lie.

To tok true sha, dis ground dem dey show say to believe di Bible no be sense-less tin but na reasonable tin; dem no be «proof» wey go force you like mathematics formula. So di assurance wey Christian get no come from evidence alone, but from di conviction wey di Holy Spirit dey put for di heart as person dey read di Word. Di Bible tok say — So, nobody go fit get faith wen e neva hear di message and na thru Christ word, wi go fit hear am. (Romans 10:17). So no matter how e take feel like fiction, to read am yourself na di beginning. Di evidence dey open di door, and assurance dey grow inside di person wey dey read.

2 Kings 20:20 · Isaya 53:5 · Maika 5:2 · Romans 10:17
s.respond.sub: Dis love nor bi informashon, na invitashon. If dat love wey dem nail for my place don tosh yor heart, naw pray dis prayer, sentence by sentence, slow-slow.
s.respond.prayer:
God,

I asept sey I bi sinna wey nor fit save ensef.

I bilive sey Jesus die for mi for di cross and E rise again.

Forgive all my sins and from today bi di Oga of my life.

Receive mi as yor pikin and make mi live new life.

For Jesus name I pray. Amen.
s.respond.after: If yu pray dis from yor heart, di Bible tok sey yu don bikom God pikin. Yu nor dey alone again — find church wey dey near yu and waka with oda pipol for di faith.
s.respond.read: Read di Bible yorsef — start from John
s.respond.verse: «But evribody wey receive and bilive en name, e go give dem di rite to bi God pikin.» — John 1:12 · Romans 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
One God,
with one story,
dey find us with love
wey nor dey ever give up.
s.closing.verse: «weda na deat or life… or anytin wey God kreate, non of dem go fit separate us from God love, bikos of Jesus Christ wey bi awa Oga God.» — Romans 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
On top dis story line, di Law, di poetry buks, di profets and di letas dey add di «flesh».
From naw, any buk wey yu open, yu go know «which point of di story yu dey».
s.closing.map: Dis whole story happen for real places — follow am for map
s.about.line: Dis kontent stand on di redemptive-historical, evangelical · Reformed view wey most of di Korean Protestant church share.

epochs.title: Creation
epochs.events: Creation for six days, man for God image, di sabbath rest
epochs.q: Wen di world just start, na God kreate di heaven and di eart.
epochs.christ: Di world bin dey made thru di «Word». John Good News announce sey dat Word na Jesus ensef (John 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Di Bible nor start with filosofi argument, but with announcemen: «Wen di world just start, na God…». Di world nor bi shans, but na di work of one personal God.

  • God image · na only man dem make like God, to know am and take kare of di world.
  • Rest · di seventh day rest show sey evritin komplete and dey for peace (shalom): «and God si sey e good».
  • Eden · di world before di breakin, where God and man dey waka togeda.
epochs.next: But dis kompleteness go soon break…

epochs.title: Di fall
epochs.one: Sin enter and di link between man and God kut.
epochs.events: Dem chop di forbidden fruit, dem drive dem komot Eden, deat and stress enter
epochs.q: I go make yu hate woman and yor pikin go still hate pikin wey woman born. Pikin wey woman born go mash yor head…
epochs.christ: Di first promise of di Good News, wey kom just afta di fall: «di pikin wey woman born» go mash di snake head. Na Jesus bi dat (Jenesis 3:15; Romans 16:20; Galatians 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Bikos dem nor obey, wantin to «bi like God», sin enter di world. Di result nor bi just to break rule, but na di breakin of relationship.

  • Broken relationship · with God (to hide), with oda pipol (to put blame), and with neсhure (ton and stress).
  • Deat · di warning «yu go die for sure» kon happen.
  • Jenesis 3:15 · but for di middle of judgement, di promise of salvation kom first. Skolas dey koll am di «protoevangelium» (di first Good News).
epochs.next: Naw God koll one man and start di restoration…

epochs.title: Di patriarchs
epochs.one: God promise Abraham: «Yu go bi channel of blessing».
epochs.events: Di kovenant with Abraham, di sakrifice of Isaac, Jacob twelve sons, Joseph as ruler of Egypt
epochs.q: Den I go turn yu to one strong kountry kon bless yu… All di family for dis eart, go get blessing, bikos of yor name.
epochs.christ: Di promise sey «all di family go get blessing» happen for Jesus, di pikin wey komot from Abraham (Galatians 3:16).
epochs.detail:
God start to solve di problem of all mankind by kolling one man, Abraham. Di senter na di kovenant (di promise): one big kountry, one land, and «blessing for all di family».

  • Faith · Abraham bilive di promise wey e nor fit si, and God kount am as raitiousness (Jenesis 15:6).
  • Isaac and Jacob · di promise pass go di nest generashon; Jacob (Israel) na fada of di twelve tribes.
  • Joseph · en broda dem sell am, but e bikom ruler of Egypt: «God let am bi like dat, make betta tins for happen» (Jenesis 50:20).
epochs.next: Di family go down to Egypt to follow Joseph… and dem end as slave.

epochs.title: Exodus and di wildaness
epochs.one: God save di slave pipol and make dem en own.
epochs.events: Di ten plagues, di Passover, di krossing of di Red Sea, di Ten Komandments for Sinai, di tent of God, 40 years for di wildaness
epochs.q: I go take una as my pipol and I go bi una God.
epochs.christ: Di Passover, where di blood of di lamb save dem from deat, point go Jesus, «awa Passover», wey dem krusify for awa place (1 Korintians 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Di biggest salvation work for di OT. Israel, wey bin bi slave, get freedom thru God pawa and na dem dey form into en pipol.

  • Di Passover · di house wey get di lamb blood for di door dey save from deat; na model for all di sakrifice wey kom afta.
  • Di Red Sea · salvation wen di sea open for dead-end korner; «to kross go di oda side» na simbol of new start.
  • Di Sinai kovenant · thru di Ten Komandments dem learn how to live as God pipol.
  • Di tent of God · di moovin holy place where God dey stay for di middle of di pipol: piksha of «Immanuel».
  • 40 years · bikos dem nor obey, one generashon waka about for di wildaness, but God dey with dem with di manna and di pillar of cloud and fire.
epochs.next: Wen dem stand before di promise land, dem ready to enter…

epochs.title: Konkwest and judges
epochs.one: Dem receive di land, but, with no king, evribody dey do wetin good for en eye.
epochs.people: Joshua; judges like Gideon and Samson; Rut
epochs.events: Di fall of Jericho, di settlemen for Kanaan, di round-and-round of sin–judgement–salvation
epochs.q: For dat time, Israel nor get king; so evribody dey do wetin dem tink sey dey good for dia eye.
epochs.christ: From di line of Rut, David kom, and from di line of David, Jesus kom (Matiu 1). Even for di middle of di disorder, di line of di Messiah dey kontinue.
epochs.detail:
Unda Joshua dem enter di promise land, but as dem settle dem soon forget God. Judges na di repeat of di same patron.

  • Di sin round-and-round · sin → presing → kry out → salvation thru one judge → sin again, each time worse.
  • Di judges · Gideon, Samson, Debora… temporary saviors, brave but full of fault.
  • Rut · one light of faithfulness for dark time; one foreign woman enter di line of David (and Jesus).
epochs.next: Di pipol kry out: «Give us king!»…

epochs.title: Di united kingdom
epochs.one: God promise David: «Yor throne go stand forever».
epochs.events: Di first king Saul, David and Goliat, di kovenant with David, Solomon temple
epochs.q: En house and kingdom go dey before mi forever; en family go rule forever.
epochs.christ: Di «throne forever» happen for Jesus, di pikin of David; na why dem dey koll am «Son of David» (Luke 1:32-33; Matiu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Di top-point of Israel, unda three kings.

  • Saul · di first king wey di pipol ask for; good start, but dem rejet am bikos e nor obey.
  • David · «one man wey dey akordin to God heart». E win Goliat and make Jerusalem en kapital. E komit big sin (Bathsheba), but e turn from sin from en heart (Psalm 51).
  • Di kovenant with David (2 Samuel 7) · God promise to stand en dynasty forever: di main root of di Messiah hope.
  • Solomon · for di top of wisdom and rishes e build di temple for Jerusalem, but for di end e fall into idol worship.
epochs.next: Afta Solomon, di kingdom split into two…

epochs.title: Di divided kingdom
epochs.one: E divide into sout (Judah) and nort (Israel), and e korrupt small-small.
epochs.people: Di kings of bot kingdoms; profets like Elijah, Isaya and Jeremaya
epochs.events: Di division of di kingdom, di idol worship, di warnings of di profets
epochs.q: And na since den Israel pipol for nort, bigin fight against David kingdom.
epochs.christ: For dis time di profets announce more klear di Messiah wey go kom (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
For di time of Solomon son di kingdom divide: Israel (nort), ten tribes, kapital Samaria; and Judah (sout), two tribes, kapital Jerusalem.

  • Di nort · all en kings serve idol; e fall to Assiria for 722 BC.
  • Di sout · di line of David kontinue and good kings like Hezekiah and Josiah dey, but for di whole e dey go down.
  • Di profets · Elijah, Amos, Isaya, Jeremaya kry «kom back!». Here di Messiah profesi rish plenty pass (di «sofa servant» of Isaya 53).
epochs.next: For di end di judgement wey dem announce kom: dem karry dem go as kaptives…

epochs.title: Di exile
epochs.one: Di kingdom fall and dem karry di pipol go foreign land.
epochs.events: Israel fall to Assiria (722); Judah fall to Babilon and dem distroy di temple (586)
epochs.q: As wi sidan near Babilon River, wi kon dey kry bikos wi dey tink about Jerusalem.
epochs.christ: For di deep pass of disappointmen, Jeremaya promise one «new kovenant» (Jeremaya 31:31): di same one wey Jesus establish for di last supper.
epochs.detail:
Di warning happen. Di temple burn and dem karry di pipol go Babilon: dem lose land, king and temple, di worst krisis.

  • Two falls · Israel (Assiria, 722 BC) and Judah (Babilon, 586 BC).
  • Daniel · eksampul of faith even for pagan palace (di lion den); e si di vision of one «kingdom forever» wey go kom.
  • One spark of hope · di vision of di dry bones wey kom alive again (Ezekiel 37) and di «new kovenant» of Jeremaya point go di future for di darkness.
epochs.next: Seventy years afta, God open di way: dem kom back home…

epochs.title: Di return from exile
epochs.one: Dem kom back and rebuild di temple and di walls.
epochs.events: Return thru di order of Cyrus, rebuildin of di temple, repair of di Jerusalem walls, restoration of di Word
epochs.q: Bikos na God happiness dey make una strong.
epochs.christ: Malakai, di last buk of di OT, klose by announcin one messenja wey go prepare di way of di Messiah: «I dey send my messenja» (Malakai 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Di return start with di order of Cyrus of Persia (538 BC). For three waves dem kom back and rebuild wetin fall.

  • Zerubbabel · rebuild di temple (finish for 516 BC).
  • Ezra · teach di law (di Word) again and restore di faith.
  • Nehemaya · rebuild di Jerusalem walls for 52 days.
  • Esther · save di Jews of Persia from being wipe komot: «who know if na for dis time…?».
  • One tirst wey kontinue · di temple dey stand, but no king like David dey. Di pipol dey wait for di Messiah.
epochs.next: And den… like klose heaven, 400 years of silens kom.

epochs.title: Di silens
epochs.one: 400 years without profet voice; but di stage dey prepared for silens.
epochs.people: Alexander di Great, di Makabees, Rome
epochs.events: Persia → Greece → Makabee independens → Roman rule
epochs.q: but wen di rite time rish, God kon send en pikin wey woman born under di law,
epochs.christ: All dis «settin di stage» na God work so dat Jesus go kom just «wen di rite time rish».
epochs.detail:
From Malakai rish di NT, around 400 years without new Bible word (profets). But, behind di history, God bin dey prepare di way for di Good News to spread.

  • Shange of empires · Persia → Greece (Alexander, 333 BC) → Egypt and Siria → Makabee revolt (167 BC) → Rome (63 BC).
  • Greek · Alexander konkwest make Greek bikom common langwej; dem translate di OT into Greek (di Septuagint), wey open di way for di Good News to spread kwik.
  • Roads and peace of Rome · di roads and di «Roman peace» turn to way for mission.
  • Sinagog and groups · di teachin for di sinagog stand strong; Pharisees and Sadducees rise up, and di wait for di Messiah mature.
epochs.next: And, di silens break, for di end E kom.

epochs.title: Di komin of Jesus
epochs.one: Di promise Messiah kom, die, and rise again.
epochs.people: Jesus, di twelve disciples, John di Baptist
epochs.events: Di komin-as-man (Christmas), en work of teachin and mirakles, di deat for di cross, di resurreshon for di third day
epochs.q: Den di Word kon shange to pesin and e stay with us for dis world… wey God send kom meet us.
epochs.christ: Di pikin wey woman born (sin 2), di blessing of Abraham (3), di Passover lamb (4), di David king forever (6) and di new kovenant (8) all happen for one Jesus: awa true profet, priest and king.
epochs.detail:
Di silens break, di promise One kom. Di four Good News tell di life, deat and resurreshon of Jesus from difren angle.

  • Komin-as-man · God bikom man (Immanuel, «God with us»), for di humble place of Betlehem.
  • Work · E teach di kingdom of God, heal sik pipol and koll sinnas. «Pesin wey don si mi, don si di Fada.»
  • Di cross · E pay for awa place di prize of di sin and deat wey di fall (sin 2) bring. Di true Passover lamb.
  • Resurreshon · for di third day E rise and break di pawa of sin, deat and Satan; even for di cross «God disgrace wiked and evil rulers for publik, wen E win dem for di cross» (Kolossians 2:15).

Na why Jesus na awa true profet (E show us di way to God), true priest (with en own body E pay for sin) and true king (E win sin, deat and Satan, and E rule forever).
epochs.next: Jesus wey rise send en disciples go di world…

epochs.title: Di start of di church
epochs.one: Di Spirit kom and di Good News spread rish di end of di eart.
epochs.events: Di komin of di Spirit for Pentecost, di birt of di church, di Good News from Jerusalem rish Rome thru persecution
epochs.q: but una go get pawa wen di Holy Spirit don enter una life and una go tell pipol about mi for Jerusalem… go rish all di far place wey dey dis world.
epochs.christ: Dis story dey kontinue rish today. Di Bible klose with di promise sey Jesus go kom back and make evritin new (Revelashon 21).
epochs.detail:
Afta Jesus go up, di promise Spirit kom for Pentecost and di church born. Di Good News spread for eksplosive way.

  • Pentecost · thru di Spirit, di disciples wey bin dey fear turn to bold witnesses.
  • Peter · announce di Good News to di Jews for Jerusalem.
  • Paul · from persecutor to apostle; e found churches thru di gentile world and rite letas.
  • Rish di end · Jerusalem → Judea → Samaria → Rome. Di promise of «all di family» wey God give Abraham happen.
  • And us · di story nor finish; e dey waka go di sekond komin of Jesus and di new heaven and eart.
epochs.next: But di story nor finish here…

epochs.title: Di restoration (evritin new)
epochs.one: Jesus kom back and make evritin new.
epochs.people: Jesus wey dey kom back; all di pipol
epochs.events: Di sekond komin, di last judgement, di end of sin, deat and tears, di new heaven and eart
epochs.q: E go klean evry tears from dia eye and deat nor go dey again. To dey mourn, kry and pain nor go dey again, bikos di tins wey dey before, don vanish.
epochs.christ: Di Eden of di first creation na dem finally restore as di «new Jerusalem». God dey with en pipol forever: di kompleteness of Immanuel (Revelashon 21:3; Matiu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Di Bible nor finish for di church time. En last buk, Revelashon, show Jesus wey kom back and komplete evritin.

  • Di sekond komin · di promise king kom back for glory.
  • Di last viktory · dem distroy Satan and deat forever, and Christ rule as King of kings (1 Korintians 15:25-26; Revelashon 20:10).
  • Judgement and resurreshon · dem make evri injustice korrect and di dead rise again.
  • New heaven and eart · sin, deat, tears and pain vanish forever (Revelashon 21:4).
  • Di restored Eden · for one «new Jerusalem» wey betta pass di beginning, God dey with en pipol forever: di goal wey di whole Bible dey point go.

Na why today na di time of «already, but not yet»: for Jesus salvation don already komplete, but en fullness dem still dey wait for.
epochs.next: So, wetin dis whole story mean for «mi»?

love: Di start of di story nor bi judgement, but na world wey overflowing love kreate.
Di moment man sin, na for there God promise salvation.
God find di pesin wey nor deserve am first, koll am by en name and make am channel of blessing.
E hear di groan of di slave pipol and E ensef kom down to save dem.
Even doh dem betray am again and again, evri time dem kry out E send savior and raise dem up again.
Even di David wey fall E nor trowey; thru am E promise king forever.
To di pipol wey turn dia back give am E send profets, dey beg: «Kom back, abeg».
Even rish di darkest land of di exile E kom down with dem and promise restoration.
Even to di pipol wey fail again and again E nor remove di promise, but E raise dem up again.
Even for di 400 years of silens, E dey prepare di way of salvation for hidden way.
While wi still bin dey sin, E send en Pikin and give en life.
Dat love wey wi receive, naw E dey send am go pour out thru di whole world.
For di end E go klean evri tears and make evritin new for love.

mis.w: «Why God make being wey fit sin? E for nor betta to nor kreate am?»
mis.t: God kreate di world and man nor bikos of any lack, but bikos of overflowing love. To make man pesin wey fit get relationship with God na love ensef. And even di enterin of sin nor komot from God plan of salvation (Efesians 1:4-5). Di first sin of di Bible nor bi judgement, but na love.

mis.w: «To chop just one fruit, dem drive yu komot and yu even get deat? God nor too hard?»
mis.t: Di drivin komot from Eden bin bi judgement and, at di same time, mercy. If, separate from God and for dat broken state, man bin chop from di tree of life and live forever, e for trap forever for di sofa (Jenesis 3:22). To allow deat na to open one way of komin back; and na for there God promise one Savior (Jenesis 3:15). For di judgement, love bin dey already.

mis.w: «Dem pik Abraham bikos of en big faith; di Bible pipol nor all bi moral heroes?»
mis.t: Abraham too lie and doubt, and Jacob bin bi diceiver. God nor koll «di kwalified», but thru grace E koll di imperfect. Di reason for di pikin nor bi dia eksellens, but na di faithful love of God (Deutronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: «Di law (di komandments) nor bi eksam or kondition wey yu must pass to dey save?»
mis.t: God save dem before E give dem di law. Di Ten Komandments start with announcemen of salvation: «Na mi bi di Oga una God wey take una komot from Egypt» (Exodus 20:2). Di law nor bi «obey am to save yorsef», but na guide of love about how to live for doz wey grace don already save (Deutronomi 7:7-9). Always grace first; obedience na di answa.

mis.w: «Di konkwest of Kanaan na merciless killing; di God of di OT na cruel afta all.»
mis.t: Na tin wey nor dey solve for one sentence and e need kare. But di Bible nor present am as random violens, but as judgement afta senturies of extreme badnes (inkludin to sakrifice pikin), afta plenty patience (Jenesis 15:16; Deutronomi 9:4-5; Levitikus 18:24-25). God nor dey hurry even for judgement, and di pesin wey turn go am E dey receive with joy, even foreigner, like Rahab and Rut (Joshua 6:25; Rut 4:13-17).

mis.w: «David bin bi hero without fault; na why dem koll am “di man akordin to God heart”.»
mis.t: David komit adultery and even killing. «Akordin to God heart» nor mean perfect, but sey e nor hide en sin, e turn from sin deep, and e always kom back to God (Psalm 51). Di love of God nor dey trowey even di pesin wey fall bad.

mis.w: «Di profet na fortune-tella wey dey predict di future; di God of di OT just dey vex.»
mis.t: Di main tin of di profet nor bi «to gues di future», but na di deep kry of God: «kom back, abeg». Even di warning of judgement nor dey find to distroy, but to make dem kom back so dat dem go live: «I nor dey happy to si doz wey dey sin, dey die» (Ezekiel 33:11).

mis.w: «Di exile prove sey God komplete-ly abandon Israel.»
mis.t: Di exile nor bi abandonmen, but na disiplin and klining of Fada to en pikin wey E love (Hibru 12:6). God nor go; E dey with Daniel for di middle of di exile and E promise: «I know wetin I plan for una; my plan na to make una prosper… and na to give una di kind future wey una dey hope to get» (Jeremaya 29:11).

mis.w: «If for 400 years no word bin dey, na nor God don go or e dey rest?»
mis.t: Di silens nor bi absens. E just nor tok; for all dat time E dey moove empires, langwejes and roads to prepare di stage of salvation. For di kwiet pass moment, God bin dey work with more love pass before (Galatians 4:4).

mis.w: «Jesus na just one more among di good moral tichas; di cross bin bi tragic defeat.»
mis.t: Jesus klaim sey E bi God (John 8:58), and di cross nor bi aksiden or defeat, but na love wey dem plan. Dem nor take am by fors, but E give en life by en own will (John 10:18). «E nor get love wey big rish di one wey make pesin die for en friend» (John 15:13).

mis.w: «Di church na religious club for perfect pipol, or just building.»
mis.t: Di church nor bi komyuniti of «perfect saints», but na komyuniti of sinnas wey dem forgive. Even di apostle Paul koll ensef «di worse» of di sinnas (1 Timoti 1:15). Di early church too argue and fail (Acts 6:1; 1 Korintians 1:11). Di church nor bi to show off, but na pipol wey dey pass di love wey dem receive (John 13:34-35).

core.title: Original sin: no raitious pesin dey
core.body: Di problem nor bi «some bad akshon», but na di root of di heart. Since Adam, evribody born unda sin and by demsef dem nor fit rish God.
core.vtext: Nobody dey raitious. Nobody dey wey wise or undastand God… Evribody don sin and wi don fall komot from God glory,

core.title: Di law nor fit save mi
core.body: Di law nor bi ladder, but na looking-glass. Di more I try to obey am, di more e show how mush I dey fail. En purpos na to karry us go Christ.
core.vtext: na thru di law, wi take know wetin sin mean… na di law bi awa tisha before Christ kom, so dat wi go fit tok sey wi dey raitious thru faith.

core.title: Thru grace: gift, nor bi efort
core.body: Salvation nor bi pay for merit wey yu gada, but na gift of God for pesin wey nor deserve am. Na why nobody fit boast.
core.vtext: God save una with en grace, bikos una get faith… nor bi with una own pawa, but na God give una. E nor save una bikos of di work wey una do, so make nobody dey boast.

core.title: Made raitious thru faith
core.body: Nor bi by obeyin di law, but by bilivin Jesus Christ na dem deklare us raitious: wi nor dey wear awa own raitiousness, but na en own.
core.vtext: Since faith don make us dey good for God eye, wi don get peace thru awa Oga God Jesus Christ… nobody dey free from God judgement… pipol go only dey free, if dem get faith for Christ.

core.title: Di Bible dey point go Jesus
core.body: Di Bible nor bi biografi of great men nor self-help buk. From Jenesis rish Revelashon, evri page dey witness one: Jesus Christ.
core.vtext: na dis same word dey tok about mi… e kon use wetin Moses and all di profets rite take tell dem wetin God tok about am for en word.

core.title: Di kingdom of God: di senter of Jesus mesej
core.body: Di tin wey Jesus teach pass. Di kingdom where God dey rule as king enter di world with Jesus and e go komplete for en sekond komin. Thru di cross and di resurreshon, Jesus na di true King wey win sin, deat and Satan.
core.vtext: Di time wey God promise sey en kingdom go kom don rish. So make una leave di sins wey una dey do kon bilive di Good News.

core.title: Di Good News: E komplete evritin
core.body: Di debt of sin wey I nor fit pay, Jesus pay am for my place for di cross, and thru di resurreshon E win deat. I nor dey lean on «do», but on «evritin don finish».
core.vtext: Evritin don finish… God show how en love for us big rish, wen E send Christ kom die for us, even doh wi still dey sin.
